title: Origins: Meowscarada
description: Meowscarada is prideful and likes to show off, but it's also sensitive.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Meowscarada

**Meowscarada is prideful and likes to show off, but it's also sensitive.**

## Core Abilities

- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/705ba9893a789e4a23fc8b9a7be86e24d398efaf.png)Overgrow
  - After Meowscarada takes damage that reduces it to half of its max HP or less, it disappears into leaves for a short time. For a short time after that, Meowscarada movement speed and damage dealt increase, and each time Meowscarada deals damage to target, it recovers HP. This Ability goes on cooldown after it's triggered.

- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/705ba9893a789e4a23fc8b9a7be86e24d398efaf.png)Trailblaze
  - Using (Primary Active) on ground, You can leap to the designated location, dealing 2 damage point to target it hits and leaving them paralyzed. If the Meowscarada hits target with this move, its basic attack and movement speed increase for a short time. Can be reactivate to leap back if hits target with this move.

- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/705ba9893a789e4a23fc8b9a7be86e24d398efaf.png)Flower Trick
  - Using (Secondary Active), you will throw a flower bomb to front, and it will attach to target. When it explodes, it deals 8 damage point.

## Passives

- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b608f6e0f172e753c2986ce3a08546a06c2cc857.png)Grass Type
  - Your movement speed and attack damage will decrease when on fire.
  - You exhausts faster in hot biome.

- 🌙Dark Type
  - Your damage increase in place that low light level.
  - At night, your movement speed increase.
  -  You deal extra damage to undead.

- 🥷🏼Assassin 
  - You sprint faster, Your damage increase when full hunger.

- 🐱Feline 
  - Takes no fall damage and jumps higher.
  - You scare off creeper.
